lists.4: Nsx_hv_bat_dfl (4):  HV Battery voltage sensor Failure

lists.3: Nsx_stc_uex_brak : "Unexpected braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.4: Nsx_stc_uex_acc_neg : "Unexpected acceleration" in case of negative torque request is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.5: Nsx_stc_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.6: Nsx_dyn_uex_acc : "Unexpected acceleration" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.7: Nsx_stc_obrak : "Over braking" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.8: Nsx_dyn_obrak : "Over braking" or "Unexpected braking" are detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.9: Nsx_stc_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.10: Nsx_dyn_lack_motr : "Lack of motricity" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.11: Nsx_stc_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "static control strategy"
lists.12: Nsx_dyn_rege_tq_loss : "Loss of regenerative torque" is detected by the "dynamic control strategy"
lists.13: Nsx_ov_der_dfl : Non zero generated torque detected in case of overvoltage
lists.14: Nsx_term_der_dfl : Non limited torque detected in case of rotor overtemperature (rotor temperature = 100%)
lists.15: Nsx_over_tq_max : state of over torque hign limit
lists.16: Nsx_under_tq_min : state of under torque low limit

lists.11: Nsx_dfl_chr_md :  DM coherency fault detected by FPGA
